54:
Bloody hells... This takes me back to me days as a cannonboy, sailin' under ol' Mistbeard...
...But they wouldn't dare, would they? Not after the lesson we learned 'em last time... Bah, they bloody <Emphasis>would</Emphasis>, though, wouldn't they, brazen ol' biddies...
